overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxury penthouse apartment in a futuristic game setting (Cyberpunk 2077). The player descends in an elevator, exits into a high-end interior featuring marble floors, a bar, lounge areas, and city views, then ascends to an upper level. The footage showcases detailed game engine rendering with cinematic lighting and modern decor.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator cabin descending through high-rise building

events.description: elevator begins descending through the building
exterior view darkens as elevator descends past lower building floors

agents.ego_description: standing in the elevator cabin watching the cityscape pass by through green-tinted windows

entered.detail: metal elevator interior with green-tinted glass windows and control panel
large green glass panels showing the building exterior and cityscape
metal control panel with buttons on the right side of the elevator

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a descending elevator with green-tinted windows. The camera looks out at the passing building exterior as the elevator moves downward through the high-rise structure. The interior is metallic and enclosed, with artificial lighting illuminating the cabin.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse entrance hall with double-height ceilings and skylights

events.description: elevator doors open and camera exits into the spacious penthouse interior
camera pans upward to view the skylights and wooden ceiling structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand entrance hall, observing the modern decor, red carpet, and high ceilings with skylights

entered.detail: long red carpet runner extending from the elevator through the main hall
polished marble flooring with grey and white patterns surrounding the carpet
dark wooden reception desk with lamps and artwork in the center of the room
large rectangular skylights in the wooden ceiling allowing natural light
long dark bar counter with stools and blue neon accent lighting
transparent glass railings along the upper level overlooking the main floor

segments.scene_description: Exiting the elevator, the scene opens into a luxurious penthouse entrance with high ceilings and skylights. The camera walks along a red carpet across marble floors, passing a reception desk and approaching a bar area. The space features modern decor with wood paneling, glass railings, and warm artificial lighting mixed with natural light from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: penthouse lounge with bar area and city view terrace

events.description: approaching large windows revealing the outdoor terrace and cityscape view
passing the bar area and turning toward the floating staircase

agents.ego_description: walking past the bar counter toward the large windows with city views, then turning toward the staircase

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling windows showing the cityscape and outdoor terrace
balcony area visible through the glass with outdoor furniture
dining table with chairs near the windows
modern staircase with open risers leading to the upper level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the main lounge area, passing the bar with its neon accents and approaching large windows that reveal a city view and outdoor terrace. The space features modern furniture, artwork on the walls, and transitions toward a floating staircase at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor private lounge with dark walls and modern furnishings

events.description: ascending the floating staircase to the upper level
entering the upper floor room with darker lighting and different decor

agents.ego_description: climbing the floating staircase and entering the upper level lounge area with dark walls

entered.detail: corridor on the upper level with red carpet and wall sconces
private lounge area with dark wood walls and modern furniture
low-profile modern bed or seating platform with dark upholstery
red illuminated warning sign visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the floating staircase to the upper level, entering a darker, more intimate lounge space. The upper floor features dark wood paneling, wall sconces, modern furniture, and a red carpet continuing through the hallway. A red warning sign is visible in the distance, indicating this is game engine footage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed descent of a high-rise elevator into the expansive, multi-level luxury of a futuristic penthouse. It begins inside a metallic cabin with green-tinted windows, looking out at the building's exterior as the elevator moves downward. As the doors open, the scene expands into a bright entrance featuring high ceilings and skylights, where the camera glides across marble floors and a red carpet toward a modern bar area. The movement then flows through a main lounge accented by neon lights and large windows overlooking the city before turning toward a floating staircase. Finally, the camera ascends to an upper level, transitioning from the open brightness of the main floor into a darker, more intimate lounge characterized by dark wood paneling and wall sconces.
